name: @cinatra-ai/list-curator-agent
description: Orchestrator agent that curates a CRM list of accounts OR contacts from a natural-language intent. Invokes @cinatra-ai/web-scrape-agent → @cinatra-ai/company-discovery-agent → @cinatra-ai/contact-discovery-agent via agent_run, pauses at 2 HITL gates (scrape-schema-review + final-list-review), and materializes the resulting CRM list via crm_list_create + per-member crm_list_member_add after operator approval. The mixed member type is not supported — CRM lists are per-object-type.
